best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-dashboardactivity-001 title: user navigates from dashboard to mainactivity module: dashboardactivity source pages: 1 preconditions: application is running, user is logged in. test data: test steps: 1. open dashboardactivity. 2. tap on "dashboard" flow. expected result: mainactivity should be launched.

test case id: tc-userlistactivity-001 title: user navigates to userlistactivity and returns to mainactivity module: userlistactivity source pages: 1 preconditions: application is running, user is logged in. test data: test steps: 1. open mainactivity. 2. tap on "elenco utenti" flow. expected result: userlistactivity should be launched, and then it should return to mainactivity upon tapping "ritorna".

test case id: tc-signupactivity-001 title: user registers and returns to mainactivity module: signupactivity source pages: 1 preconditions: application is running, user is not logged in. test data: valid email, password, and name. test steps: 1. open mainactivity. 2. tap on "registrazione" flow. 3. enter valid email, password, and name. 4. tap on "register" button. 5. tap on "ritorna" flow. expected result: mainactivity should be launched with the user logged in.

test case id: tc-userlist-nonempty-001 title: user navigates to a non-empty userlistactivity module: userlistactivity source pages: 1 preconditions: application is running, user is logged in, and there are users in the system. test data: test steps: 1. open mainactivity. 2. tap on "elenco utenti" flow. expected result: userlistactivity should display a list of users.
